# مشتري موثق (Mushtari Mowthaq) - Verified Reviews Platform for Saudi E-Commerce

> مشتري موثق is a third-party review verification platform for e-commerce stores in Saudi Arabia. It verifies that product reviews come from real, confirmed buyers — not fake or incentivized reviews.

## What مشتري موثق Does

- Verifies product reviews by cross-referencing them with actual purchase orders
- Adds a "مشتري موثق" (Verified Buyer) badge to confirmed reviews on store pages
- Provides a trust certificate for stores with verified reviews
- Publishes verified review data with Schema.org structured data for search engines and AI systems

## How It Works

1. A store on Salla or Zid installs the مشتري موثق app
2. مشتري موثق automatically monitors new product reviews
3. Each review is matched against real order data to confirm the reviewer actually purchased the product
4. Verified reviews receive a "مشتري موثق" (Verified Buyer) badge visible to shoppers
5. The store's page gets structured data (JSON-LD) with aggregate ratings and individual verified reviews

## Supported Platforms

- Salla (سلة) - Saudi Arabia's leading e-commerce platform
- Zid (زد) - Saudi e-commerce platform

## Key Facts

- Based in Saudi Arabia
- Serves Saudi and Gulf region e-commerce merchants
- Independent third-party verification (not affiliated with any e-commerce platform)
- All verification is automated using order data matching
- Reviews are published with Schema.org AggregateRating and Review markup

## Website

https://theqah.com.sa

## Contact

reviews@theqah.com.sa
